A quick and easy way to make your fortune in the old days would have been to invest in the stock market as a speculator. However, in this world, no one cares about anyone else's fortune but their own. Today, however, fortune is achieved in a more efficient way: currency trading.

By leveraging sophisticated algorithmic trading, you can quickly and easily make your share of another person's misery, or, failing that, at the very least, reap what others have sown. That, my friend, is the world of cryptocurrency economics.
